title: `sq` binary is missing in tests
body:
https://github.com/podman-container-tools/container-libs/pull/911#discussion_r3394857570 :
```
=== RUN   TestNewMechanismFromDirectory
    sequoia_test.go:71: sq not usable: exec: "sq": executable file not found in $PATH
```

comments.body:
https://github.com/podman-container-tools/automation/

I will handle it, buildah needs some other packages as well.
